hooks.command: MEMPALACE_PALACE_PATH=$(bash ~/.mempalace/palace_detect.sh) cat | ~/.mempalace/venv/bin/python3 -m mempalace hook run --hook stop --harness claude-code
MEMPALACE_PALACE_PATH=$(bash ~/.mempalace/palace_detect.sh) cat | ~/.mempalace/venv/bin/python3 -m mempalace hook run --hook stop --harness claude-code

bash -c 'CWD=$(pwd); if ls "$CWD" 2>/dev/null | grep -qE "^(package\.json|go\.mod|requirements\.txt|Cargo\.toml|pyproject\.toml|build\.gradle|\.git)$"; then if [ ! -d "$CWD/.code-review-graph" ]; then echo "SETUP NEEDED: code-review-graph not initialized in this project. Run: code-review-graph install --platform claude-code && code-review-graph build"; fi; fi'
